channel.title: multics on Abdullah
channel.description: Recent content in multics on Abdullah

item.title: Crack Airtel Card
item.description: Crack Airtel Card A few days ago I was asked to crack a card. So today I thought to write a post for this method. Prerequisites A linux machine log file hashcat Some common sense Getting the hashes Open log file and search for CW and decrypted CW. Remove the leading zeros and copy the last 16 characters for first appearing CW’s. Do same with decrypted CW. Enjoin them with a : so it will look like this:
